description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-tooltip`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 13 defects — 2 P0, 5 P1, 6 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 1: `aria-describedby` ID reference crosses Shadow DOM boundary
- [ ] [P0] 2: `pointer-events: none` on tooltip violates WCAG 1.4.13

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-tooltip
